name: Fukuda Corporation
summary: Fukuda Corporation engages in the construction business in Japan. It is involved in the contracting, planning, design, supervision, and consulting of construction works; exchanging, leasing, brokerage, and management of real estate; the construction and sale of houses; and the creation and sale of land. The company also provides regional development, urban development, and environmental improvement, as well as related contracting, planning, designing, supervising, and consulting services. In addition, it is involved in the ownership, rental, and management of accommodation facilities, sports facilities, recreation facilities, health and medical facilities, etc. Further, the company processes, sells, and rents construction materials, and equipment and machinery. Its projects comprise construction, roads, railways, ports, and energy related facilities. The company was founded in 1902 and is headquartered in Niigata, Japan.
